case_title: HISHAM TAMMAM VS. WHOLE FOODS OCEAN

docket_entries.description: ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF TAMMAM, HISHAM

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON OCT-19-2022 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF HISHAM TAMMAM'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAMMAM, HISHAM AS TO DEFENDANT WHOLE FOODS OCEAN SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-08-2023 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-02-2022 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-14-2023

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAMMAM, HISHAM ORDER SETTING HEARING FOR OCT-19-2022 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 206
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-08-2023 IS OFF CALENDAR. COMPLAINT IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
FEES NOT PAID. FILING OF COMPLAINT BY PLAINTIFF HISHAM TAMMAM ON OCT-03-2022 IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. (206)
